anomalies.draftedAction: M-102 stopped ~3min at 08:03Z with low 63% util suggests planned tool change or operator interaction rather than crash. Review 4 captured frames for chuck/turret motion, chip buildup, or alarm beacon. If beacon red/no operator present: dispatch tech to check spindle load fault and door interlock. If operator present at panel: likely tool change/inspection, no action. Confirm part program resumed; if stopped >8min escalate to supervisor and log downtime against job.
anomalies.briefing: M-102 Lathe stopped 3min @08:03Z (63% util), likely tool change/operator interaction—verify resume, escalate if >8min stoppage.
